title: Ruby Red Polka Dots Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 274cm) 1 Piece - Ideal for Parties and Events
features: VIBRANT RUBY RED DESIGN: Our ruby red polka dots rectangular plastic table cover features a bright and eye-catching color that adds a captivating touch to your party or event - perfect for birthdays, baby showers, bridal parties, and more.

CONVENIENT SIZE & SHAPE: Measuring at 137cm x 274cm, this spacious rectangular table cover comfortably fits most standard table sizes, providing ample space for placing a variety of dishes and cutlery while keeping your table clean and protected.

ADORABLE POLKA DOTS PATTERN: The playful and universally loved polka dots design on this table cover effortlessly complements any party theme or decor style, adding an extra touch of fun and charm to your celebration.

DURABLE & DISPOSABLE: Crafted from high-quality plastic, this table cover offers durability and effortless clean-up - simply discard after use for a hassle-free post-party experience, allowing you to focus on enjoying your event.

IDEAL PARTY ESSENTIAL: Perfect for both indoor and outdoor party settings, our ruby red polka dots table cover is an essential item for hosting successful, worry-free, and stylish parties or events that leave a lasting impression on your guests.
